articles.title_en: A bill on sanctions against the Russian Federation will be introduced into the US House of Representatives on July 22
articles.lead_en: The updated document provides for the tightening of unilateral restrictions, as well as the introduction of duties in relation to Russia's trading partners
articles.title_raw: В Палату представителей США 22 июля внесут законопроект о санкциях против РФ
articles.lead_raw: Обновленный документ предусматривает ужесточение односторонних рестрикций, а также введение пошлин в отношении торговых партнеров России

articles.title_en: Ukraine’s strike on Russian retail giant Wildberries’ warehouses may have cost sellers at least 150 billion rubles
articles.lead_en: Overnight on July 18, Ukraine attacked two warehouses belonging to Wildberries, Russia’s largest online marketplace, citing the fact that drone components were stored there. Eight people were killed and more than 80 were injured.
articles.title_raw: Ukraine’s strike on Russian retail giant Wildberries’ warehouses may have cost sellers at least 150 billion rubles

articles.title_en: Russia's trade with Asia-Pacific almost entirely shifted to rubles, friendly currencies
articles.lead_en: Russia's trade turnover with the region has already reached about $500 bln, accounting for more than 74% of Russia's total foreign trade, Russia's Ambassador-at-Large at the Foreign Ministry Marat Berdyev said

articles.title_en: About 30% of Russians surveyed plan to buy another car in the next two years
articles.lead_en: The average budget for buying a car is about 2.2 million rubles, according to a joint study by Avito Auto and Avito Advertising.
articles.title_raw: Около 30% опрошенных россиян планируют купить еще одно авто в ближайшие два года
articles.lead_raw: Средний бюджет на покупку машины составляет около 2,2 млн рублей, говорится в совместном исследовании "Авито авто" и "Авито рекламы"

articles.title_en: Russia, ASEAN see prospects for cooperation in energy security — Lavrov
articles.lead_en: The Foreign Minister separately said that ASEAN leaders have reached important agreements in the areas of politics and security, combating new threats and challenges, and developing trade, economic, investment, cultural, educational and humanitarian ties

articles.lead_en: The yuan exchange rate decreased by 4 kopecks to 11.6 rubles

articles.title_en: Russia’s State Duma passes law extending fuel price dampener to diesel imports, subsidizing importers to keep prices in check
articles.lead_en: Russia’s State Duma passed a law in its second and third readings extending the fuel price dampener mechanism to diesel imports. Oil companies will receive federal budget compensation for the gap between export prices and domestic market prices — a mechanism previously adopted for gasoline imports.
articles.title_raw: Russia’s State Duma passes law extending fuel price dampener to diesel imports, subsidizing importers to keep prices in check
articles.lead_raw: Russia’s State Duma passed a law in its second and third readings extending the fuel price dampener mechanism to diesel imports. articles.title_en: In the Russian Federation, a trade union of digital currency market participants will be created by September
articles.lead_en: It will appear with the support of the Association of Russian Banks

articles.title_en: Fuel situation improves in several Russian regions as supply curbs lifted — deputy PM
articles.lead_en: According to Alexander Novak, the positive impact stems from temporary bans on petroleum product exports, market saturation through imports, as well as increased domestic production

articles.title_en: How much damage can Russia’s fuel crisis do to the economy?
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian drone strikes have pushed Russia into a fuel crisis, and its consequences are already being felt across the economy: inflation is accelerating, industrial output is slowing, and the country’s GDP is sinking deeper into stagnation. But the scale of the damage depends directly on Ukraine’s ability to sustain the intensity of its drone campaign.

articles.title_en: Russian Central Bank may pause rate-cutting cycle, expert says
articles.lead_en: Vladimir Yeremkin believes the regulator's decision could be influenced by rising inflation expectations, which may prompt the Bank of Russia to upwardly revise its year-end inflation forecast
